name: Lettuce with Sweet Oxyporum Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the lettuce; cut or tear into bite-size pieces and place into a salad bowl.
2. Combine the ground cumin, ginger, rue (optional), pepper, honey, vinegar, and liquamen in a small bowl. Mash the dates with your fingers and add them to the spices mixture. Mix well until the dates break into small fibers.
3. Pour the dressing over the lettuce and serve. Optionally, try adding 1/3 teaspoon baking soda for extra flavor.
